policies.name: users insert own app events
policies.check:
((event_name ~ '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_.:-]{0,119}$'::text) AND ((duration_ms IS NULL) OR (duration_ms >= 0)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM app_users u
  WHERE ((u.id = app_events.app_user_id) AND (u.auth_user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))))) AND ((session_id IS NULL) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM app_sessions s
  WHERE ((s.id = app_events.session_id) AND (s.app_user_id = app_events.app_user_id))))))

policies.using: (is_active AND ((expires_at IS NULL) OR (expires_at > now())))

policies.name: users insert valid shared links
policies.check:
(is_active AND (slug = lower(slug)) AND (slug ~ '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]{5,63}$'::text) AND (((content_type = 'place'::text) AND (place_id IS NOT NULL) AND (route_id IS NULL) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM places p
  WHERE ((p.id = shared_links.place_id) AND (p.app_status = 'published'::text))))) OR ((content_type = 'route'::text) AND (route_id IS NOT NULL) AND (place_id IS NULL) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (routes r
     JOIN app_users u ON ((u.id = r.app_user_id)))
  WHERE ((r.id = shared_links.route_id) AND (r.status = 'saved'::text) AND r.is_public AND (u.auth_user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))))))))

policies.name: public read active tag groups
policies.using: (status = 'active'::text)

policies.name: public read active tags
policies.using: (status = 'active'::text)

functions.name: require_tag_group
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.require_tag_group(p_tag_id uuid, p_group_key text)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.tags t
    join public.tag_groups tg on tg.id = t.group_id
    where t.id = p_tag_id
      and tg.key = p_group_key
      and t.status <> 'archived'
      and tg.status <> 'archived'
  );
$function$
